privileged_info_summary: books.toscrape.com is a real, publicly accessible e-commerce demo website containing 1,000 books across 50 pages designed specifically for web scraping practice. The site has no crawler restrictions and is fully crawlable. Screaming Frog SEO Spider is a real desktop GUI application that exports page titles with 'Title 1' column, meta descriptions with 'Meta Description 1' column, and H1 tags with 'H1-1' column - all matching standard export formats. The task requires crawling at least 100 pages (feasible given 1000+ pages available when including product and category pages), exporting three SEO elements to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/, and writing a summary report to ~/Documents/SEO/reports/on_page_audit.txt. The verifier expects 100 points total with a 60-point pass threshold. Search Marketing Strategist is a verified occupation (ONET 13-1161.01), though the specific $10.9B GDP figure cited could not be verified against current industry data.
